goal: Replace Homebrew install with a curl | sh one-liner so users can actually install cuz
approach: Created install.sh that detects OS/arch, downloads the right release binary, falls back to ~/.local/bin if /usr/local/bin needs sudo, and runs cuz setup. Removed Formula/ dir and update-formula CI job since brew is no longer the install method.

alternatives.option: Keep brew and fix post_install permissions
alternatives.rejected_because: brew sandboxes post_install so it can't write to ~/.claude/; no clean workaround

alternatives.option: Brew for binary + tell user to run cuz setup
alternatives.rejected_because: User wants a single-command install with no manual steps
